case_title: ELITE SAN FRANCISCO VS WILLIAMS DEIRDRE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,755.00 FILED BY ELITE SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS DEIRDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
